title: Spellbook Familiar
bio: Mossmarg the Mild is a spellbook familiar who follows witches by scooting across the floor. They feel patient, grow moss on one corner, and purr whenever a spell is spelled correctly.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a thick rounded rectangle for the closed spellbook. Add a curved spine on the left and a thin page block on the right.
steps.hint: Make the book chunky so it feels like a little creature.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, place two calm oval eyes on the cover. Add soft heavy eyebrows and a small catlike mouth.
steps.hint: Low gentle eyebrows make Mossmarg look old, kind, and mysterious.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add a moon symbol, corner moss blobs, page lines, tiny paws peeking out, and a few quiet sparkles.
steps.hint: The paws can be small ovals under the book, barely showing.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the book cover, spine, pages, face, moon, moss, paws, and sparkles with smooth readable lines.
steps.hint: Keep the moss as soft blobs so it looks cozy instead of detailed.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the cover, pages, moss, moon, and paws. Add a soft shadow beneath the scooting book.
steps.hint: Use small accent dots around the moon symbol for a gentle spellbook glow.
